title: AssemblyAI Recognizer Options
description: AssemblyAI-specific STT options. Only applies when recognizer vendor is 'assemblyai'.

apiKey.description: AssemblyAI API key. Overrides credentials configured in jambonz.

minEndOfTurnSilenceWhenConfident.description: Minimum silence duration (seconds) to trigger end-of-turn when confidence is met.

maxTurnSilence.description: Maximum silence duration (seconds) before forcing end-of-turn.
